citations.narrative:
The IACUC meeting minutes for September 2025 document a non-compliance for a pig on a cardiopulmonary protocol.
According to the adverse event form, on 8/13/25 the pig was anesthetized for a terminal procedure and was given an
incorrect drug by the anesthesia technician. The pig was supposed to receive diphenhydramine prior to a contrast
injection. The technician inadvertently administered phenylephrine. The animal became tachycardic with ventricular
fibrillation and manual cardiac massage was performed. Tissue was harvested and the animal was euthanized as per
protocol. The drug administered (phenylephrine) is listed on the protocol but was administered outside of the described
indication and dose. The facility retrained the technicians on proper procedure for drawing up drugs.
Failure to handle animals in a careful manner may result in physical harm or discomfort.
Handling of animals must be done as carefully as possible in a manner that does not cause physical harm or discomfort.
Correct by: Corrected prior to inspection. Continue to ensure all animals are handled in a careful manner from 4/17/26
forward.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC representatives.
n

narrative:
2.38(f)(1) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The IACUC meeting minutes for September 2025 document a non-compliance for a pig on a cardiopulmonary protocol. 
According to the adverse event form, on 8/13/25 the pig was anesthetized for a terminal procedure and was given an 
incorrect drug by the anesthesia technician. The pig was supposed to receive diphenhydramine prior to a contrast 
injection. The technician inadvertently administered phenylephrine. The animal became tachycardic with ventricular 
fibrillation and manual cardiac massage was performed. Tissue was harvested and the animal was euthanized as per 
protocol. The drug administered (phenylephrine) is listed on the protocol but was administered outside of the described 
indication and dose. The facility retrained the technicians on proper procedure for drawing up drugs. 
Failure to handle animals in a careful manner may result in physical harm or discomfort. 
Handling of animals must be done as carefully as possible in a manner that does not cause physical harm or discomfort. 
Correct by: Corrected prior to inspection. Continue to ensure all animals are handled in a careful manner from 4/17/26 
forward. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the IACUC representatives.
